QF.id: VB Fund Distribution and Channel Management_12

question.text: Which of the following is a way investors can buy mutual funds today?

answer.text: All of these — through distributors, AMC websites, mobile apps, and stock exchange platforms

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** Today, investors have many channels to buy mutual funds: through distributors, directly from AMC websites, through mobile apps, via stock exchange platforms (BSE StAR MF, NSE NMF II), through MF Utilities (MFU), and through bank branches.
**The Trap:** No single channel is the only option. The mutual fund industry has multiple distribution channels to make investing convenient for everyone.
**Cross-Exam Context:** Also tested in Series V-A. Understanding the diversity of distribution channels is important.
**Distributor's Pro-Tip:** As a distributor, you compete with many channels. Your advantage is personal service, guidance, and hand-holding — especially valuable for first-time investors and senior citizens.
